_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in developing user credential management systems
reference_document_element_description: Skill in designing data stewardship programs that assign clear ownership, accountability, and service level agreements for enterprise data domains.
comments: NICE skill intersects with WIDAI DG domain. Skill DG-S-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-K-016 (DA, cosine: 0.453), SP-K-004 (SP, cosine: 0.419).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: Moderate similarity (5.1/10). The cross-encoder finds meaningful but bounded overlap — consistent with cross-framework mapping between cybersecurity and data/AI domains where shared governance concepts use different terminology.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: Moderate token-level alignment (F1=0.883). Precision exceeds Recall (P=0.903 > R=0.864), indicating the NICE element's semantic content is more tightly aligned with the KSA than the reverse.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: Contradiction-dominant (99.6%). The model detects scope divergence — the concepts may use similar vocabulary in opposing contexts. This warrants review but may reflect domain-specific usage patterns rather than true semantic conflict.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder (0.498) closely tracks STS (0.508). The small gap (0.010) indicates the relationship is capturable through independent encoding — shared surface semantics align with cross-attention analysis.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Low lexical overlap (8.7%). Limited shared vocabulary — the relationship is primarily semantic rather than terminological.
